title: Understanding farmer dependence on different income streams and how this influences behaviour and the delivery of ecosystem services associated with permanent grasslands.
description: A study assessing how farmers’ reliance on various income sources, including CAP subsidies, impacts their management of permanent grasslands and the delivery of ecosystem services across diverse European contexts. The analysis combines a systematic literature review with Farm Accountancy Data Network (FADN) data to evaluate economic drivers, policy effectiveness, and implications for targeted agri-environment support.
